description: OpenHands skill-writer-agent step 3 workflow JSON output.

tests.description: [smoke] generate skill output path and eval creation

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const trace = Array.isArray(data.call_trace) ? data.call_trace.join(' ') : ''; data.status === 'generated' && data.skipped !== true && typeof data.commit_summary === 'string' && data.commit_summary.length > 20 && data.version_bump === 'minor' && Array.isArray(data.call_trace) && data.call_trace.length >= 5 && /read-user-context/.test(trace) && /read-decisions/.test(trace) && /use-skill-creator-skill/.test(trace) && /write-skill/.test(trace) && /write-references/.test(trace) && /write-evals/.test(trace)
